<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<Control>
	<Title>津波警報・注意報・予報a</Title>
	<DateTime>2021-08-05T03:56:58Z</DateTime>
	<Status>通常</Status>
	<EditorialOffice>気象庁本庁</EditorialOffice>
	<PublishingOffice>気象庁</PublishingOffice>
</Control>
<Head xmlns="http://xml.kishou.go.jp/jmaxml1/informationBasis1/">
	<Title>津波注意報・津波予報</Title>
	<ReportDateTime>2021-08-05T12:56:00+09:00</ReportDateTime>

	<EventID>20210805103531</EventID>
	<InfoType>取消</InfoType>
	<Serial></Serial>
	<InfoKind>津波警報・注意報・予報</InfoKind>
	<InfoKindVersion>1.0_1</InfoKindVersion>
	<Headline>
		<Text>津波注意報を取り消します。</Text>
	</Headline>
</Head>
<Body xmlns="http://xml.kishou.go.jp/jmaxml1/body/seismology1/" xmlns:jmx_eb="http://xml.kishou.go.jp/jmaxml1/elementBasis1/">
	<Text>先ほどの、津波注意報を取り消します。</Text>

</Report>
